title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Blue Dart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Blue Dart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Blue Dart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About Blue Dart:
Blue Dart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
